reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación de servicio, precios de combustible normales. Los playeros muy amables y brindan excelente atención. En el shop los precios son acordes con las demás estaciones de servicio y la atención es muy cordial. Si estás de paso por Villa María la recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
Very good gas station, average fuel prices. The attendants are very friendly and provide excellent service. The prices at the shop are in line with other gas stations, and the service is very friendly. If you're passing through Villa María, I recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10933277104463478772/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXcG9TQ1hREAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, but it would have been ideal if they had added another attendant. The one who served us was VERY friendly.
